UW-40  PROCEDURES FOR POSTWELD HEAT TREATMENT. (a) PWHT shall be performed using procedures that specify the heating rate, holding temperature, holding time, and cooling rate. (b) The holding temperature shall be as specified in UCS-79 for carbon and low alloy steels, or UHA-34 for high alloy steels. (c) Furnace PWHT is preferred. Local PWHT may be used, subject to the requirements of this paragraph. Thermocouples shall be used to verify temperature compliance. See UW-28 for when PWHT is required. For exemptions, refer to UW-29. Test coupons subjected to PWHT shall be prepared in accordance with UCS-85.
